```text
     1→# CLAUDE.md
     2→
     3→This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
     4→
     5→## Overview
     6→
     7→Lexical-based rich editor ecosystem. Modular packages: core editor, UI primitives, content renderers, plugins, and integration bundles.
     8→
     9→**Build**: Vite 6 + Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS. ESM only (`.mjs`). TypeScript 5.9.
    10→
    11→## Terminology: Static / Edit Split
    12→
    13→The editor ecosystem splits both **nodes** and **renderers** into static (read-only) and edit (editor-only) variants for bundle optimization.
    14→
    15→### Four Concepts
    16→
    17→| Term | Layer | Purpose | Example |
    18→|------|-------|---------|---------|
    19→| **Static Node** | Lexical node class | Deserialize JSON + `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper`. No edit UI imports. | `CodeBlockNode`, `AlertQuoteNode` |
    20→| **Edit Node** | Lexical node class | Extends static node, overrides `decorate()` to use edit decorator with heavy deps (Popover, NestedComposer, etc.) | `CodeBlockEditNode`, `AlertQuoteEditNode` |
    21→| **Static Renderer** | React component | Display-only rendering. No `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` or `lucide-react` imports. | `AlertRenderer`, `MermaidRenderer` |
    22→| **Edit Renderer** | React component | Adds edit UI (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog). Imports `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`. | `AlertEditRenderer`, `MermaidEditRenderer` |
    23→
    24→### Bundle Optimization Strategy
    25→
    26→```
    27→RichRenderer (read-only display)          RichEditor (full editing)
    28→├── Static Nodes (config.ts)              ├── Edit Nodes (config.ts)
    29→├── Static Renderers                      ├── Edit Renderers
    30→│   (enhancedRendererConfig)              │   (enhancedEditRendererConfig)
    31→└── Zero edit UI deps                     └── Full edit UI deps
    32→```
    33→
    34→**Key principle**: `RichRenderer` entry imports only static nodes + static renderers, so bundlers tree-shake all edit UI deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`, `lucide-react`, `LexicalNestedComposer`). `RichEditor` entry imports edit nodes + edit renderers that bring in these deps.
    35→
    36→**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path introduces heavy imports absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean prop with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable`), no split needed.
    37→
    38→### Registration
    39→
    40→| Config file | Contains | Used by |
    41→|-------------|----------|---------|
    42→| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config.ts` | `customNodes` / `allNodes` (static) | `RichRenderer` |
    43→| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config-edit.ts` | `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit) | `RichEditor` |
    44→| `@haklex/rich-renderers` `config.ts` | `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers) | `ShiroRenderer` |
    45→| `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` `config.ts` | `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers) | `ShiroEditor` |
    46→
    47→## Package Dependency Graph
    48→
    49→```
    50→@haklex/rich-kit-shiro (integration bundle for web app)
    51→├── @haklex/rich-editor (core: editor + renderer + nodes + plugins + styles)
    52→│   └── @haklex/rich-editor-ui (headless Dialog, Dropdown, Popover via @base-ui/react)
    53→├── @haklex/rich-static-renderer (headless SSR engine, RichRenderer component)
    54→├── @haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu (typeahead slash commands)
    55→├── @haklex/rich-renderers (static-only aggregator)
    56→│   └── @haklex/rich-renderer-{codeblock,mermaid,image,video,gallery,alert,linkcard,...}
    57→├── @haklex/rich-renderers-edit (edit-only aggregator, depends on rich-renderers)
    58→│   └── edit renderers + edit nodes + slash-menu + TldrawPlugin + EmbedPlugin
    59→└── @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw (whiteboard extension)
    60→
    61→@haklex/rich-diff (standalone diff viewer, depends on core)
    62→@haklex/rich-editor-demo (dev playground, depends on all)
    63→```
    64→
    65→## Commands
    66→
    67→```bash
    68→# Build
    69→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build            # BUILD_LIB=1 vite build
    70→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-static-renderer build
    71→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build
    72→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers build
    73→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers-edit build     # depends on rich-renderers
    74→
    75→# Dev playground (hot reload, all features)
    76→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev
    77→
    78→# Watch mode for core iteration
    79→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor dev:build
    80→```
    81→
    82→## Core: @haklex/rich-editor
    83→
    84→Three entry points: `./` (all), `./editor` (RichEditor), `./renderer` (RichRenderer).
    85→
    86→### Directory Layout
    87→
    88→- `src/nodes/` — 18 custom `DecoratorNode` types (Image, CodeBlock, KaTeX, Mermaid, Tldraw, Alert, Gallery, LinkCard, Component, Tabs, Grid, Details, Banner, Spoiler, Mention, Footnote, TaskListItem, Video)
    89→- `src/plugins/` — 16 Lexical plugins (content insertion, auto-link, drag-drop, floating toolbar, markdown shortcuts, onChange with debounce)
    90→- `src/styles/` — Vanilla Extract: 3 variants × 2 color schemes = 6 theme classes
    91→- `src/transformers/` — Markdown shortcut transformers (alert `>[!NOTE]`, KaTeX `$$`, mention `@`, spoiler `||`, footnote `[^1]`, tasklist `- [x]`)
    92→- `src/context/` — `ColorSchemeContext` (light/dark) + `RendererConfigContext` (custom renderer injection) + `ImageUploadContext` (upload function injection)
    93→
    94→**Context Provider value stability**: Never pass object literals as context provider `value`. Primitives (string, function) can be passed directly (e.g. `ColorSchemeContext`, `ImageUploadContext`). Objects must be wrapped in `useMemo` (e.g. `RendererConfigContext`).
    95→- `src/components/renderers/` — 12 built-in default renderers
    96→
    97→### Custom Node Pattern
    98→
    99→All custom content nodes extend `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`:
   100→
   101→```typescript
   102→class FooNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
   103→  static importJSON(serialized) / exportJSON()
   104→  decorate() → <RendererWrapper type="Foo" props={...} />
   105→}
   106→export function $createFooNode(payload): FooNode
   107→export function $isFooNode(node): node is FooNode
   108→```
   109→
   110→`RendererWrapper` delegates to custom renderer (via `RendererConfig`) or falls back to built-in default.
   111→
   112→### Node: Edit / Render Split
   113→
   114→Nodes with heavy edit UI (Popover, DropdownMenu, LexicalNestedComposer etc.) are split into two classes for tree-shaking:
   115→
   116→| Base Node (render-only) | Edit Node (editor-only) | Edit Dependency |
   117→|------------------------|------------------------|-----------------|
   118→| `CodeBlockNode` | `CodeBlockEditNode` | `CodeBlockEditDecorator` |
   119→| `KaTeXBlockNode` | `KaTeXBlockEditNode` | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
   120→| `KaTeXInlineNode` | `KaTeXInlineEditNode` | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
   121→| `LinkCardNode` | `LinkCardEditNode` | `LinkCardEditDecorator` + Popover + lucide-react |
   122→| `AlertQuoteNode` | `AlertQuoteEditNode` | `AlertEditDecorator` + LexicalNestedComposer |
   123→
   124→**Base node** `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper` (or lightweight read-only decorator). No edit UI imports.
   125→
   126→**Edit node** extends base node, overrides `clone()` / `importJSON()` / `decorate()` to use the full edit decorator with heavy deps.
   127→
   128→Config files:
   129→- `src/config.ts` — `customNodes` / `allNodes` (render-only, used by `RichRenderer`)
   130→- `src/config-edit.ts` — `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit nodes, used by `RichEditor`)
   131→
   132→**Adding a new node with edit UI**: Create base node with `RendererWrapper` in `decorate()`, then create `FooEditNode extends FooNode` overriding `decorate()` with edit decorator. Register base in `config.ts`, edit in `config-edit.ts`.
   133→
   134→### Plugin Pattern
   135→
   136→```typescript
   137→export const INSERT_FOO_COMMAND = createCommand<Payload>('INSERT_FOO_COMMAND')
   138→export function FooPlugin() {
   139→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   140→  useEffect(() => editor.registerCommand(INSERT_FOO_COMMAND, handler, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR), [editor])
   141→  return null
   142→}
   143→```
   144→
   145→## Variant System
   146→
   147→Controlled by `variant` prop + `ColorSchemeContext`. Theme CSS variables in `src/styles/vars.css.ts` via `createThemeContract`.
   148→
   149→| Variant | Font | Size | Line-height | Max-width | Use case |
   150→|---------|------|------|-------------|-----------|----------|
   151→| article | system sans-serif | 16px | 1.75 | 65ch | Blog posts |
   152→| note | CJK serif (Noto Serif CJK SC) | 16px | 1.8 | 65ch | Personal notes |
   153→| comment | system sans-serif | 14px | 1.5 | none | Inline comments |
   154→
   155→## Renderer Config (Custom Renderer Injection)
   156→
   157→```typescript
   158→interface RendererConfig {
   159→  Alert?, CodeBlock?, Component?, Footnote?, Gallery?,
   160→  Image?, KaTeX?, LinkCard?, Mermaid?, Mention?, Tabs?, Video?
   161→}
   162→<RichEditor rendererConfig={...} />
   163→<RichRenderer rendererConfig={...} />
   164→```
   165→
   166→## Individual Renderer Packages
   167→
   168→`@haklex/rich-renderer-*` packages provide feature-specific renderers with heavy dependencies isolated:
   169→- `codeblock` — Shiki syntax highlighting
   170→- `mermaid` — Mermaid diagram rendering
   171→- `image` — Blurhash, captions, accent colors
   172→- `video` — Responsive video players
   173→- `gallery` — Image grid with lightbox
   174→- `alert` — GitHub-style alerts (info/warning/tip/caution/important)
   175→- `linkcard` — Link preview cards
   176→- `mention` — Social platform mention badges
   177→
   178→`@haklex/rich-renderers` aggregates all, with sub-path exports: `./codeblock`, `./mermaid`, etc.
   179→
   180→### Renderer: Edit / Static Split
   181→
   182→Renderer components with edit-only heavy deps are split into static and edit variants:
   183→
   184→| Package | Static (display-only) | Edit (with edit UI) | Edit Dependency |
   185→|---------|----------------------|---------------------|-----------------|
   186→| `rich-renderer-alert` | `AlertRenderer` | `AlertEditRenderer` | DropdownMenu (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
   187→| `rich-renderer-mermaid` | `MermaidRenderer` | `MermaidEditRenderer` | presentDialog (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
   188→| `rich-renderer-mention` | `MentionRenderer` | `MentionEditRenderer` | Popover (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) + lucide-react |
   189→
   190→Packages without edit-specific heavy deps (`codeblock`, `image`, `video`, `gallery`, `linkcard`) do not need splitting.
   191→
   192→Aggregator packages:
   193→- `@haklex/rich-renderers` — static-only. `enhancedRendererConfig` (`config.ts`), for `RichRenderer`. No edit deps.
   194→- `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` — edit-only. `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (`config.ts`), for `RichEditor`. Depends on `@haklex/rich-renderers` for `enhancedRendererConfig` spread. Also re-exports edit nodes (`embedEditNodes`, `tabsEditNodes`), plugins (`EmbedPlugin`, `TldrawPlugin`, `SlashMenuPlugin`), and slash-menu utilities.
   195→
   196→**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path imports heavy deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui` components, `lucide-react` icons) absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean flag with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable` prop), splitting adds complexity with no bundle benefit.
   197→
   198→**Adding a new renderer with edit UI**: Create `FooRenderer` (static) and `FooEditRenderer` (edit) in the same package. Export both from `index.ts`. Add static to `enhancedRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers`, edit to `enhancedEditRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit`.
   199→
   200→## Integration: @haklex/rich-kit-shiro
   201→
   202→Production bundle for the web app. Combines core + all renderers + tldraw + slash menu.
   203→
   204→```typescript
   205→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style.css'
   206→import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/editor'   // → enhancedEditRendererConfig
   207→import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderer' // → enhancedRendererConfig
   208→```
   209→
   210→`ShiroEditor` uses `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers). `ShiroRenderer` uses `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers). This ensures the renderer entry tree-shakes all edit UI deps (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog, lucide-react edit icons).
   211→
   212→## Tldraw Integration (@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw)
   213→
   214→`TldrawNode` (DecoratorNode) stores tldraw snapshot as JSON string. Renderer lazy-loaded via `React.lazy()` with Suspense.
   215→
   216→## Diff Viewer (@haklex/rich-diff)
   217→
   218→```typescript
   219→<RichDiff oldValue={...} newValue={...} variant="article" />
   220→```
   221→
   222→Compares two `SerializedEditorState` at node level. Side-by-side layout with insert/delete highlighting.
   223→
   224→## Build Configuration
   225→
   226→Each package uses the same Vite pattern:
   227→
   228→- `BUILD_LIB=1` triggers library mode build
   229→- Vanilla Extract plugin for CSS-in-TS → static CSS (zero runtime)
   230→- All React, Lexical, and peer deps externalized
   231→- Output: ESM `.mjs` + `.d.ts` declarations
   232→- Target: ES2020
   233→
   234→## Styling
   235→
   236→Vanilla Extract (`*.css.ts` files) throughout. No Tailwind in editor packages. Theme contract defines CSS variables for colors, spacing, typography, and border-radius. Each variant+colorScheme combination produces a class name applied to the editor root.
   237→
   238→### Neutral colors
   239→
   240→Use a **neutral** (gray) color palette for secondary/muted text, borders, section labels, and descriptions—e.g. `#737373` / `#a3a3a3` (Tailwind neutral-500/400). Avoid tinted grays (slate, zinc, blue-gray) unless a design explicitly requires them. This keeps UI elements like slash menu sections and descriptions hue-neutral.
   241→
```

Excellent! Now let me compile the comprehensive report. I have thoroughly explored the packages directory.

## Comprehensive Package Exploration Report

### Summary
吾已完整探索Shiroi packages目录，32个包分为三层：**核心** (rich-editor及其基础) → **特性** (插件、扩展、渲染器) → **聚合** (生产bundle)。

### Core Infrastructure

#### 1. **@haklex/cm-editor** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Shared CodeMirror 6 editor utilities for code editing
- **Key Exports**: `baseTheme`, `getThemeExtensions()`, `loadLanguageExtension()`, language/selection helpers
- **Dependencies**: @codemirror/*, none of ecosystem
- **CSS**: None

#### 2. **@haklex/rich-headless** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Headless Lexical node registry for server-side parsing (zero React)
- **Key Exports**: 
  - Builtin nodes: `builtinNodes` (HeadingNode, QuoteNode, ListNode, CodeNode, etc.)
  - Custom nodes: `allHeadlessNodes` (20 nodes: Image, Video, LinkCard, KaTeX, Mermaid, Mention, CodeBlock, Footnote, Embed, CodeSnippet, Gallery, Tldraw, Banner, AlertQuote, GridContainer, Ruby, Spoiler, Details, FootnoteSection)
  - Transformers: `allHeadlessTransformers`, `$toMarkdown()`
- **Dependencies**: Only @lexical/* (code, extension, link, list, markdown, rich-text, table), no React
- **Dual Entry**: Default `./` + `./transformers`
- **CSS**: None

#### 3. **@haklex/rich-style-token** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Style tokens and CSS variables (theme + layout)
- **Key Exports**: 
  - Theme creation: `createThemeStyle()`, `ThemeTokens` type
  - Portal theme: `PortalThemeProvider`, `usePortalTheme()`, `PortalTheme` type
  - Theme presets: `articleTheme`, `commentTheme`, `noteTheme`, `vars` (CSS module)
  - Color/layout constants: `darkColors`, `lightArticleColors`, `lightCommentColors`, `fonts`, `articleLayout`, `noteLayout`, `commentLayout`
- **Dependencies**: None
- **CSS**: Vanilla Extract (`vars.css.ts`)

---

### Core Editor

#### 4. **@haklex/rich-editor** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Core Lexical editor with 16 custom nodes + 16 plugins + transformers + built-in renderers
- **Nodes** (24 files, 16 custom):
  - Base nodes: `SpoilerNode`, `MentionNode`, `KaTeXInlineNode`, `KaTeXBlockNode`, `ImageNode`, `AlertQuoteNode`, `CodeBlockNode`, `FootnoteNode`, `FootnoteSectionNode`, `VideoNode`, `LinkCardNode`, `DetailsNode`, `GridContainerNode`, `BannerNode`, `MermaidNode`, `RubyNode`
  - Edit nodes: `AlertQuoteEditNode`, `BannerEditNode`, `CodeBlockEditNode`, `FootnoteSectionEditNode`, `GridEditNode`
- **Plugins** (3 files): Core plugins (content insertion, auto-link, drag-drop, floating toolbar, markdown shortcuts, onChange)
- **Transformers** (14 files): Markdown shortcuts for alert `>[!NOTE]`, KaTeX `$$`, mention `@`, spoiler `||`, footnote `[^1]`, tasklist `- [x]`, ruby, container, grid, quote, superscript/subscript, insert
- **Contexts** (5 files):
  - `ColorSchemeContext` — light/dark theme
  - `FootnoteDefinitionsContext` — footnote defs
  - `ImageUploadContext` — upload callback
  - `NestedContentRendererContext` — nested rendering
  - `RendererConfigContext` — custom renderer injection
- **Built-in Renderers** (12): Default fallback renderers for all node types
- **Configs**:
  - `src/config.ts` — `customNodes` + `allNodes` (render-only, for RichRenderer)
  - `src/config-edit.ts` — `customEditNodes` + `allEditNodes` (edit nodes, for RichEditor)
- **Three Entry Points**:
  - `./` — All (editor + renderer)
  - `./editor` — RichEditor with edit UI
  - `./static` — RichRenderer (render-only)
  - `./styles` — CSS variables only
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-headless, @haklex/rich-style-token, nanoid (block IDs), thumbhash
- **Peerless**: @base-ui/react, @lexical/*, lexical, lucide-react, katex (optional), shiki (optional)

#### 5. **@haklex/rich-editor-ui** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Headless UI primitives (Dialog, Dropdown, Popover) via @base-ui/react
- **No notes on source, but used by all edit renderers and edit nodes**

---

### Extensions & Plugins

#### 6. **@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Multi-file code snippet extension with drag-reorder
- **Key Exports**:
  - Nodes: `CodeSnippetNode`, `CodeSnippetEditNode`, `codeSnippetNodes`, `codeSnippetEditNodes`
  - Renderers: `CodeSnippetRenderer`, `CodeSnippetEditRenderer`
  - Transformer: `CODE_SNIPPET_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/cm-editor (CodeMirror), @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-headless, @haklex/rich-renderer-codeblock (syntax highlighting), @haklex/rich-style-token, @dnd-kit/* (drag-drop), lucide-react, shiki
- **Dual Entry**: `./` (edit) + `./static` (render-only)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 7. **@haklex/rich-ext-embed** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Embed extension (Twitter, YouTube, Bilibili, Codesandbox, Gist, GitHub preview)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Nodes: `EmbedNode`, `EmbedEditNode`, `embedNodes`, `embedEditNodes`
  - Plugin: `EmbedPlugin`, `INSERT_EMBED_COMMAND`
  - Renderers: `EmbedStaticRenderer`, `EmbedLinkRenderer`
  - Context: `EmbedRendererProvider`, `useEmbedRenderers()`
  - URL matchers: `isTweetUrl()`, `isYoutubeUrl()`, `isBilibiliVideoUrl()`, etc.
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-style-token, lucide-react, react-tweet (@innei/react-tweet@3.4.2)
- **Dual Entry**: `./` (full) + `./static` (static renderers + nodes only)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 8. **@haklex/rich-ext-gallery** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Image gallery with drag-reorder and lightbox
- **Key Exports**:
  - Nodes: `GalleryNode`, `GalleryEditNode`, `galleryNodes`, `galleryEditNodes`
  - Renderers: `GalleryRenderer`, `GalleryEditRenderer`
  - Type: `GalleryNodePayload`, `SerializedGalleryNode`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token, @dnd-kit/*, react-intersection-observer, react-photo-view, thumbhash
- **No dual entry** (Peerless lucide-react)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 9. **@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Whiteboard drawing extension (tldraw integration)
- **Already documented in CLAUDE.md**

#### 10. **@haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Block handle plugin (add button + context menu)
- **Key Exports**: `BlockHandlePlugin`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/*, lexical, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 11. **@haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Floating toolbar for text formatting
- **Key Exports**: `FloatingToolbarPlugin`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/link, @lexical/react, @lexical/selection, lexical, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 12. **@haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Link editing plugin (inline popover for URLs)
- **Key Exports**: `FloatingLinkEditorPlugin`, `FloatingLinkEditorPluginProps` type
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/link, @lexical/react, lexical, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 13. **@haklex/rich-plugin-mention** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Mention typeahead plugin (@username with platform selection: Twitter, GitHub, Discord, etc.)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Plugin: `MentionMenuPlugin`, `MentionMenuPluginProps` type
  - MenuItem: `MentionMenuItem`
  - Registry: `builtinPlatforms`, `getAllPlatforms()`, `MentionPlatformDef` type
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-renderer-mention, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/react, lexical
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 14. **@haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Slash command menu (typeahead for block insertion)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Plugin: `SlashMenuPlugin`, `SlashMenuPluginProps` type
  - UI: `SlashMenuItem`, `SlashMenuList`
  - Helpers: `collectNodeSlashItems()`, `getBuiltinItems()`
- **Already documented in CLAUDE.md**

#### 15. **@haklex/rich-plugin-table** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Table editing plugin (cell resizing, row/column handles)
- **Key Exports**: `TableCellResizerPlugin`, `TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/react, @lexical/table, lexical, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

---

### Renderers (Static + Edit Split)

#### 16. **@haklex/rich-renderer-alert** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: GitHub-style alerts (info/warning/tip/caution/important)
- **Already documented; supports static/edit split**

#### 17. **@haklex/rich-renderer-banner** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Banner container renderer (colored block with nested content)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Static: `BannerRenderer` (default export)
  - Edit: `BannerEditRenderer`
- **Dual Entry**: `./` (edit) + `./static` (static only)
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 18. **@haklex/rich-renderer-codeblock** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Code block with syntax highlighting (Shiki)
- **Already documented; no split (editable prop only)**

#### 19. **@haklex/rich-renderer-image** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Image renderer with captions and blurhash
- **Already documented; no split needed**

#### 20. **@haklex/rich-renderer-katex** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: KaTeX math renderer (inline + block equations)
- **Key Exports**: `KaTeXBlockEditNode`, `KaTeXInlineEditNode`, `KaTeXEditDecorator`, `katexEditNodes`
- **No default export (edit-only package)**
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token, lucide-react, katex (optional)
- **Peerless**: @lexical/react, lexical, katex (optional)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 21. **@haklex/rich-renderer-linkcard** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Link preview card (URL → title/description/favicon)
- **Already documented; no split needed**

#### 22. **@haklex/rich-renderer-mention** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Social platform mention badges (Twitter, GitHub, Discord handles)
- **Already documented; supports static/edit split**

#### 23. **@haklex/rich-renderer-mermaid** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Mermaid diagram rendering
- **Already documented; supports static/edit split**

#### 24. **@haklex/rich-renderer-ruby** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Ruby annotation (furigana for Japanese text)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Static: `RubyRenderer`
  - Edit: `RubyEditRenderer`
  - Type: `RubyRendererProps`
- **Dual Entry**: `./` (edit) + `./static` (static only)
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: None (no edit UI beyond markup)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 25. **@haklex/rich-renderer-video** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Responsive video player renderer
- **Already documented; no split needed**

---

### Aggregators

#### 26. **@haklex/rich-renderers** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Static-only renderer aggregator (tree-shakes all edit UI)
- **Key Export**: `enhancedRendererConfig` (RendererConfig object)
  - Includes: Alert, Banner, CodeBlock, Image, LinkCard, Mention, Ruby, Gallery, Mermaid, Video, CodeSnippet (all static variants)
- **Dependencies**: All @haklex/rich-renderer-* + @haklex/rich-ext-* (static exports)
- **Dual Entry**: Single config export

#### 27. **@haklex/rich-renderers-edit** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Edit-only aggregator (brings full edit UI)
- **Key Exports**: `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (spreads `enhancedRendererConfig` + overrides with edit renderers)
  - Overrides: Alert, Banner, CodeBlock, Image, Mention, Ruby, Gallery, Mermaid, Video, CodeSnippet, Footnote (all edit variants)
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-renderers (for base config), all edit renderers/nodes

#### 28. **@haklex/rich-kit-shiro** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Production bundle for web app (all features pre-integrated)
- **Entry Points**: `./editor` (RichEditor) + `./renderer` (RichRenderer)
- **Already documented**

---

### Utilities & Diff Viewer

#### 29. **@haklex/rich-diff** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Side-by-side diff viewer for SerializedEditorState
- **Component**: `<RichDiff oldValue={...} newValue={...} variant="article" />`
- **Already documented**

#### 30. **@haklex/rich-editor-demo** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Dev playground (hot reload, all features)
- **Build target**: `pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev`

#### 31. **@haklex/types** (shiro-types)
- **Purpose**: Shared type definitions across monorepo
- **Already documented**

---

### Dependency & Registration Summary

**Node Registration**:
| Config | Location | Contains | Used By |
|--------|----------|----------|---------|
| `src/config.ts` | @haklex/rich-editor | 16 custom nodes (render-only) | RichRenderer |
| `src/config-edit.ts` | @haklex/rich-editor | 16 custom nodes (edit variants) | RichEditor |
| Dynamic | Individual packages | Edit node classes (KaTeXEditNode, etc.) | Packages export for registration |

**Renderer Registration**:
| Config | Location | Contains | Used By |
|--------|----------|----------|---------|
| `src/config.ts` | @haklex/rich-renderers | Static renderers + nodes | ShiroRenderer (read-only) |
| `src/config.ts` | @haklex/rich-renderers-edit | Edit renderers + plugins | ShiroEditor (editing) |

**New/Recently Expanded Packages**:
- **@haklex/cm-editor** — CodeMirror utilities (extracted)
- **@haklex/rich-headless** — Server-side parsing (zero-React)
- **@haklex/rich-style-token** — Centralized theming
- **@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet** — Multi-file snippets
- **@haklex/rich-ext-embed** — URL embeds (Twitter, YouTube, Bilibili, etc.)
- **@haklex/rich-ext-gallery** — Image gallery with lightbox
- **@haklex/rich-plugin-*** — 7 plugins (block-handle, floating-toolbar, link-edit, mention, table, slash-menu, tldraw)
- **@haklex/rich-renderer-banner** — Banner containers
- **@haklex/rich-renderer-katex** — Math equations
- **@haklex/rich-renderer-ruby** — Furigana annotations
- All packages support **static/edit split** where heavy edit deps are isolated.

     1→/**
     2→ * @haklex/rich-headless
     3→ *
     4→ * Headless-compatible Lexical node registry for server-side parsing.
     5→ * Zero React dependency — only lexical + standard @lexical/* packages.
     6→ *
     7→ * Usage with @lexical/headless:
     8→ *   import { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
     9→ *   import { allHeadlessNodes } from '@haklex/rich-headless'
    10→ *   const editor = createHeadlessEditor({ nodes: allHeadlessNodes })
    11→ */
    12→
    13→import { CodeHighlightNode, CodeNode } from '@lexical/code'
    14→import { HorizontalRuleNode } from '@lexical/extension'
    15→import { AutoLinkNode, LinkNode } from '@lexical/link'
    16→import { ListItemNode, ListNode } from '@lexical/list'
    17→import { HeadingNode, QuoteNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
    18→import { TableCellNode, TableNode, TableRowNode } from '@lexical/table'
    19→import {
    20→  DecoratorNode,
    21→  type EditorConfig,
    22→  ElementNode,
    23→  type Klass,
    24→  type LexicalEditor,
    25→  type LexicalNode,
    26→  type NodeKey,
    27→  type SerializedElementNode,
    28→  type SerializedLexicalNode,
    29→} from 'lexical'
    30→
    31→// ── Builtin nodes ──
    32→
    33→export const builtinNodes: Klass<LexicalNode>[] = [
    34→  HeadingNode,
    35→  QuoteNode,
    36→  ListNode,
    37→  ListItemNode,
    38→  LinkNode,
    39→  AutoLinkNode,
    40→  HorizontalRuleNode,
    41→  TableNode,
    42→  TableCellNode,
    43→  TableRowNode,
    44→  CodeNode,
    45→  CodeHighlightNode,
    46→]
    47→
    48→// ── Helpers ──
    49→
    50→function stubDOM(): HTMLElement {
    51→  return document.createElement('span')
    52→}
    53→
    54→function extractText(state: unknown): string {
    55→  if (!state || typeof state !== 'object') return ''
    56→  const root = (state as Record<string, unknown>).root as
    57→    | Record<string, unknown>
    58→    | undefined
    59→  if (!root) return ''
    60→  return walkChildren(root)
    61→}
    62→
    63→function walkChildren(node: Record<string, unknown>): string {
    64→  const children = node.children as Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined
    65→  if (!children) return (node.text as string) ?? ''
    66→  return children.map(walkChildren).join('\n')
    67→}
    68→
    69→// ── SpoilerNode (ElementNode, inline) ──
    70→
    71→export class SpoilerNode extends ElementNode {
    72→  static getType(): string {
    73→    return 'spoiler'
    74→  }
    75→  static clone(node: SpoilerNode): SpoilerNode {
    76→    return new SpoilerNode((node as any).__key)
    77→  }
    78→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
    79→    super(key)
    80→  }
    81→  static importJSON(_json: SerializedElementNode): SpoilerNode {
    82→    return new SpoilerNode()
    83→  }
    84→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode {
    85→    return { ...super.exportJSON(), type: 'spoiler', version: 1 }
    86→  }
    87→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
    88→    return stubDOM()
    89→  }
    90→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    91→    return false
    92→  }
    93→  isInline(): boolean {
    94→    return true
    95→  }
    96→}
    97→
    98→// ── RubyNode (ElementNode, inline) ──
    99→
   100→export class RubyNode extends ElementNode {
   101→  __reading = ''
   102→
   103→  static getType(): string {
   104→    return 'ruby'
   105→  }
   106→  static clone(node: RubyNode): RubyNode {
   107→    const n = new RubyNode((node as any).__key)
   108→    n.__reading = node.__reading
   109→    return n
   110→  }
   111→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   112→    super(key)
   113→  }
   114→  static importJSON(
   115→    json: SerializedElementNode & { reading?: string },
   116→  ): RubyNode {
   117→    const node = new RubyNode()
   118→    node.__reading = json.reading ?? ''
   119→    return node
   120→  }
   121→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode & { reading: string } {
   122→    return {
   123→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   124→      type: 'ruby',
   125→      reading: this.__reading,
   126→      version: 1,
   127→    }
   128→  }
   129→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   130→    return stubDOM()
   131→  }
   132→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   133→    return false
   134→  }
   135→  isInline(): boolean {
   136→    return true
   137→  }
   138→}
   139→
   140→// ── DetailsNode (ElementNode, block) ──
   141→
   142→export class DetailsNode extends ElementNode {
   143→  __summary = ''
   144→  __open = false
   145→
   146→  static getType(): string {
   147→    return 'details'
   148→  }
   149→  static clone(node: DetailsNode): DetailsNode {
   150→    const n = new DetailsNode((node as any).__key)
   151→    n.__summary = node.__summary
   152→    n.__open = node.__open
   153→    return n
   154→  }
   155→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   156→    super(key)
   157→  }
   158→  static importJSON(
   159→    json: SerializedElementNode & { summary?: string; open?: boolean },
   160→  ): DetailsNode {
   161→    const node = new DetailsNode()
   162→    node.__summary = json.summary ?? ''
   163→    node.__open = json.open ?? false
   164→    return node
   165→  }
   166→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode & { summary: string; open: boolean } {
   167→    return {
   168→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   169→      type: 'details',
   170→      summary: this.__summary,
   171→      open: this.__open,
   172→    }
   173→  }
   174→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   175→    return stubDOM()
   176→  }
   177→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   178→    return false
   179→  }
   180→}
   181→
   182→// ── Generic headless DecoratorNode ──
   183→
   184→type Props = Record<string, unknown>
   185→
   186→function headlessDecorator(
   187→  type: string,
   188→  propKeys: string[],
   189→  defaults: Props,
   190→  inline = false,
   191→) {
   192→  class Node extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   193→    constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   194→      super(key)
   195→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   196→        ;(this as any)[`__${k}`] = defaults[k]
   197→      }
   198→    }
   199→    static getType(): string {
   200→      return type
   201→    }
   202→    static clone(node: Node): Node {
   203→      const n = new Node((node as any).__key)
   204→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   205→        ;(n as any)[`__${k}`] = (node as any)[`__${k}`]
   206→      }
   207→      return n
   208→    }
   209→    static importJSON(json: SerializedLexicalNode & Props): Node {
   210→      const node = new Node()
   211→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   212→        ;(node as any)[`__${k}`] = json[k] ?? defaults[k]
   213→      }
   214→      return node
   215→    }
   216→    exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode & Props {
   217→      const out: Props = { type, version: 1 }
   218→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   219→        out[k] = (this as any)[`__${k}`]
   220→      }
   221→      return out as SerializedLexicalNode & Props
   222→    }
   223→    createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   224→      return stubDOM()
   225→    }
   226→    updateDOM(): boolean {
   227→      return false
   228→    }
   229→    decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): null {
   230→      return null
   231→    }
   232→    isInline(): boolean {
   233→      return inline
   234→    }
   235→  }
   236→  return Node as unknown as Klass<LexicalNode>
   237→}
   238→
   239→// ── Simple property-based nodes ──
   240→
   241→export const ImageNode = headlessDecorator(
   242→  'image',
   243→  ['src', 'altText', 'width', 'height', 'caption', 'thumbhash', 'accent'],
   244→  {
   245→    src: '',
   246→    altText: '',
   247→    width: undefined,
   248→    height: undefined,
   249→    caption: undefined,
   250→    thumbhash: undefined,
   251→    accent: undefined,
   252→  },
   253→)
   254→
   255→export const VideoNode = headlessDecorator(
   256→  'video',
   257→  ['src', 'poster', 'width', 'height'],
   258→  { src: '', poster: undefined, width: undefined, height: undefined },
   259→)
   260→
   261→export const LinkCardNode = headlessDecorator(
   262→  'link-card',
   263→  ['url', 'source', 'id', 'title', 'description', 'favicon', 'image'],
   264→  {
   265→    url: '',
   266→    source: undefined,
   267→    id: undefined,
   268→    title: undefined,
   269→    description: undefined,
   270→    favicon: undefined,
   271→    image: undefined,
   272→  },
   273→)
   274→
   275→export const KaTeXInlineNode = headlessDecorator(
   276→  'katex-inline',
   277→  ['equation'],
   278→  { equation: '' },
   279→  true,
   280→)
   281→
   282→export const KaTeXBlockNode = headlessDecorator('katex-block', ['equation'], {
   283→  equation: '',
   284→})
   285→
   286→export const MermaidNode = headlessDecorator('mermaid', ['diagram'], {
   287→  diagram: '',
   288→})
   289→
   290→export const MentionNode = headlessDecorator(
   291→  'mention',
   292→  ['platform', 'handle', 'displayName'],
   293→  { platform: '', handle: '', displayName: undefined },
   294→  true,
   295→)
   296→
   297→export const CodeBlockNode = headlessDecorator(
   298→  'code-block',
   299→  ['code', 'language'],
   300→  { code: '', language: '' },
   301→)
   302→
   303→export const FootnoteNode = headlessDecorator(
   304→  'footnote',
   305→  ['identifier'],
   306→  { identifier: '' },
   307→  true,
   308→)
   309→
   310→export const FootnoteSectionNode = headlessDecorator(
   311→  'footnote-section',
   312→  ['definitions'],
   313→  { definitions: {} },
   314→)
   315→
   316→export const EmbedNode = headlessDecorator('embed', ['url', 'source'], {
   317→  url: '',
   318→  source: null,
   319→})
   320→
   321→export const CodeSnippetNode = headlessDecorator('code-snippet', ['files'], {
   322→  files: [],
   323→})
   324→
   325→export const GalleryNode = headlessDecorator('gallery', ['images', 'layout'], {
   326→  images: [],
   327→  layout: 'grid',
   328→})
   329→
   330→export const TldrawNode = headlessDecorator('tldraw', ['snapshot'], {
   331→  snapshot: '',
   332→})
   333→
   334→// ── Nested content nodes ──
   335→
   336→export class BannerNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   337→  __bannerType = 'note'
   338→  __contentState: unknown = null
   339→
   340→  static getType(): string {
   341→    return 'banner'
   342→  }
   343→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   344→    super(key)
   345→  }
   346→  static clone(node: BannerNode): BannerNode {
   347→    const n = new BannerNode((node as any).__key)
   348→    n.__bannerType = node.__bannerType
   349→    n.__contentState = node.__contentState
   350→    return n
   351→  }
   352→  static importJSON(
   353→    json: SerializedLexicalNode & {
   354→      bannerType?: string
   355→      content?: unknown
   356→    },
   357→  ): BannerNode {
   358→    const node = new BannerNode()
   359→    node.__bannerType = json.bannerType ?? 'note'
   360→    node.__contentState = json.content ?? null
   361→    return node
   362→  }
   363→  exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode {
   364→    return {
   365→      type: 'banner',
   366→      version: 1,
   367→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   368→      content: this.__contentState,
   369→    } as SerializedLexicalNode
   370→  }
   371→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   372→    return stubDOM()
   373→  }
   374→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   375→    return false
   376→  }
   377→  decorate(): null {
   378→    return null
   379→  }
   380→  getTextContent(): string {
   381→    return extractText(this.__contentState)
   382→  }
   383→}
   384→
   385→export class AlertQuoteNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   386→  __alertType = 'note'
   387→  __contentState: unknown = null
   388→
   389→  static getType(): string {
   390→    return 'alert-quote'
   391→  }
   392→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   393→    super(key)
   394→  }
   395→  static clone(node: AlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   396→    const n = new AlertQuoteNode((node as any).__key)
   397→    n.__alertType = node.__alertType
   398→    n.__contentState = node.__contentState
   399→    return n
   400→  }
   401→  static importJSON(
   402→    json: SerializedLexicalNode & {
   403→      alertType?: string
   404→      content?: unknown
   405→    },
   406→  ): AlertQuoteNode {
   407→    const node = new AlertQuoteNode()
   408→    node.__alertType = json.alertType ?? 'note'
   409→    node.__contentState = json.content ?? null
   410→    return node
   411→  }
   412→  exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode {
   413→    return {
   414→      type: 'alert-quote',
   415→      version: 1,
   416→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   417→      content: this.__contentState,
   418→    } as SerializedLexicalNode
   419→  }
   420→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   421→    return stubDOM()
   422→  }
   423→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   424→    return false
   425→  }
   426→  decorate(): null {
   427→    return null
   428→  }
   429→  getTextContent(): string {
   430→    return extractText(this.__contentState)
   431→  }
   432→}
   433→
   434→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   435→  __cols = 2
   436→  __gap = '16px'
   437→  __cells: unknown[] = []
   438→
   439→  static getType(): string {
   440→    return 'grid-container'
   441→  }
   442→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   443→    super(key)
   444→  }
   445→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
   446→    const n = new GridContainerNode((node as any).__key)
   447→    n.__cols = node.__cols
   448→    n.__gap = node.__gap
   449→    n.__cells = node.__cells
   450→    return n
   451→  }
   452→  static importJSON(
   453→    json: SerializedLexicalNode & {
   454→      cols?: number
   455→      gap?: string | number
   456→      cells?: unknown[]
   457→    },
   458→  ): GridContainerNode {
   459→    const node = new GridContainerNode()
   460→    node.__cols = json.cols ?? 2
   461→    const rawGap = json.gap
   462→    node.__gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : (rawGap ?? '16px')
   463→    node.__cells = json.cells ?? []
   464→    return node
   465→  }
   466→  exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode {
   467→    return {
   468→      type: 'grid-container',
   469→      version: 1,
   470→      cols: this.__cols,
   471→      gap: this.__gap,
   472→      cells: this.__cells,
   473→    } as SerializedLexicalNode
   474→  }
   475→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   476→    return stubDOM()
   477→  }
   478→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   479→    return false
   480→  }
   481→  decorate(): null {
   482→    return null
   483→  }
   484→  getTextContent(): string {
   485→    return this.__cells.map((cell) => extractText(cell)).join('\n')
   486→  }
   487→}
   488→
   489→// ── Aggregate ──
   490→
   491→export const customHeadlessNodes: Klass<LexicalNode>[] = [
   492→  SpoilerNode,
   493→  RubyNode,
   494→  DetailsNode,
   495→  ImageNode,
   496→  VideoNode,
   497→  LinkCardNode,
   498→  KaTeXInlineNode,
   499→  KaTeXBlockNode,
   500→  MermaidNode,
   501→  MentionNode,
   502→  CodeBlockNode,
   503→  FootnoteNode,
   504→  FootnoteSectionNode,
   505→  EmbedNode,
   506→  CodeSnippetNode,
   507→  GalleryNode,
   508→  TldrawNode,
   509→  BannerNode,
   510→  AlertQuoteNode,
   511→  GridContainerNode,
   512→]
   513→
   514→export const allHeadlessNodes: Klass<LexicalNode>[] = [
   515→  ...builtinNodes,
   516→  ...customHeadlessNodes,
   517→]
   518→

   522→

Excellent! Now let me compile the comprehensive report. I have thoroughly explored the packages directory.

## Comprehensive Package Exploration Report

### Summary
吾已完整探索Shiroi packages目录，32个包分为三层：**核心** (rich-editor及其基础) → **特性** (插件、扩展、渲染器) → **聚合** (生产bundle)。

### Core Infrastructure

#### 1. **@haklex/cm-editor** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Shared CodeMirror 6 editor utilities for code editing
- **Key Exports**: `baseTheme`, `getThemeExtensions()`, `loadLanguageExtension()`, language/selection helpers
- **Dependencies**: @codemirror/*, none of ecosystem
- **CSS**: None

#### 2. **@haklex/rich-headless** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Headless Lexical node registry for server-side parsing (zero React)
- **Key Exports**: 
  - Builtin nodes: `builtinNodes` (HeadingNode, QuoteNode, ListNode, CodeNode, etc.)
  - Custom nodes: `allHeadlessNodes` (20 nodes: Image, Video, LinkCard, KaTeX, Mermaid, Mention, CodeBlock, Footnote, Embed, CodeSnippet, Gallery, Tldraw, Banner, AlertQuote, GridContainer, Ruby, Spoiler, Details, FootnoteSection)
  - Transformers: `allHeadlessTransformers`, `$toMarkdown()`
- **Dependencies**: Only @lexical/* (code, extension, link, list, markdown, rich-text, table), no React
- **Dual Entry**: Default `./` + `./transformers`
- **CSS**: None

#### 3. **@haklex/rich-style-token** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Style tokens and CSS variables (theme + layout)
- **Key Exports**: 
  - Theme creation: `createThemeStyle()`, `ThemeTokens` type
  - Portal theme: `PortalThemeProvider`, `usePortalTheme()`, `PortalTheme` type
  - Theme presets: `articleTheme`, `commentTheme`, `noteTheme`, `vars` (CSS module)
  - Color/layout constants: `darkColors`, `lightArticleColors`, `lightCommentColors`, `fonts`, `articleLayout`, `noteLayout`, `commentLayout`
- **Dependencies**: None
- **CSS**: Vanilla Extract (`vars.css.ts`)

---

### Core Editor

#### 4. **@haklex/rich-editor** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Core Lexical editor with 16 custom nodes + 16 plugins + transformers + built-in renderers
- **Nodes** (24 files, 16 custom):
  - Base nodes: `SpoilerNode`, `MentionNode`, `KaTeXInlineNode`, `KaTeXBlockNode`, `ImageNode`, `AlertQuoteNode`, `CodeBlockNode`, `FootnoteNode`, `FootnoteSectionNode`, `VideoNode`, `LinkCardNode`, `DetailsNode`, `GridContainerNode`, `BannerNode`, `MermaidNode`, `RubyNode`
  - Edit nodes: `AlertQuoteEditNode`, `BannerEditNode`, `CodeBlockEditNode`, `FootnoteSectionEditNode`, `GridEditNode`
- **Plugins** (3 files): Core plugins (content insertion, auto-link, drag-drop, floating toolbar, markdown shortcuts, onChange)
- **Transformers** (14 files): Markdown shortcuts for alert `>[!NOTE]`, KaTeX `$$`, mention `@`, spoiler `||`, footnote `[^1]`, tasklist `- [x]`, ruby, container, grid, quote, superscript/subscript, insert
- **Contexts** (5 files):
  - `ColorSchemeContext` — light/dark theme
  - `FootnoteDefinitionsContext` — footnote defs
  - `ImageUploadContext` — upload callback
  - `NestedContentRendererContext` — nested rendering
  - `RendererConfigContext` — custom renderer injection
- **Built-in Renderers** (12): Default fallback renderers for all node types
- **Configs**:
  - `src/config.ts` — `customNodes` + `allNodes` (render-only, for RichRenderer)
  - `src/config-edit.ts` — `customEditNodes` + `allEditNodes` (edit nodes, for RichEditor)
- **Three Entry Points**:
  - `./` — All (editor + renderer)
  - `./editor` — RichEditor with edit UI
  - `./static` — RichRenderer (render-only)
  - `./styles` — CSS variables only
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-headless, @haklex/rich-style-token, nanoid (block IDs), thumbhash
- **Peerless**: @base-ui/react, @lexical/*, lexical, lucide-react, katex (optional), shiki (optional)

#### 5. **@haklex/rich-editor-ui** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Headless UI primitives (Dialog, Dropdown, Popover) via @base-ui/react
- **No notes on source, but used by all edit renderers and edit nodes**

---

### Extensions & Plugins

#### 6. **@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Multi-file code snippet extension with drag-reorder
- **Key Exports**:
  - Nodes: `CodeSnippetNode`, `CodeSnippetEditNode`, `codeSnippetNodes`, `codeSnippetEditNodes`
  - Renderers: `CodeSnippetRenderer`, `CodeSnippetEditRenderer`
  - Transformer: `CODE_SNIPPET_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/cm-editor (CodeMirror), @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-headless, @haklex/rich-renderer-codeblock (syntax highlighting), @haklex/rich-style-token, @dnd-kit/* (drag-drop), lucide-react, shiki
- **Dual Entry**: `./` (edit) + `./static` (render-only)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 7. **@haklex/rich-ext-embed** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Embed extension (Twitter, YouTube, Bilibili, Codesandbox, Gist, GitHub preview)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Nodes: `EmbedNode`, `EmbedEditNode`, `embedNodes`, `embedEditNodes`
  - Plugin: `EmbedPlugin`, `INSERT_EMBED_COMMAND`
  - Renderers: `EmbedStaticRenderer`, `EmbedLinkRenderer`
  - Context: `EmbedRendererProvider`, `useEmbedRenderers()`
  - URL matchers: `isTweetUrl()`, `isYoutubeUrl()`, `isBilibiliVideoUrl()`, etc.
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-style-token, lucide-react, react-tweet (@innei/react-tweet@3.4.2)
- **Dual Entry**: `./` (full) + `./static` (static renderers + nodes only)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 8. **@haklex/rich-ext-gallery** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Image gallery with drag-reorder and lightbox
- **Key Exports**:
  - Nodes: `GalleryNode`, `GalleryEditNode`, `galleryNodes`, `galleryEditNodes`
  - Renderers: `GalleryRenderer`, `GalleryEditRenderer`
  - Type: `GalleryNodePayload`, `SerializedGalleryNode`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token, @dnd-kit/*, react-intersection-observer, react-photo-view, thumbhash
- **No dual entry** (Peerless lucide-react)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 9. **@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Whiteboard drawing extension (tldraw integration)
- **Already documented in CLAUDE.md**

#### 10. **@haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Block handle plugin (add button + context menu)
- **Key Exports**: `BlockHandlePlugin`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/*, lexical, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 11. **@haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Floating toolbar for text formatting
- **Key Exports**: `FloatingToolbarPlugin`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/link, @lexical/react, @lexical/selection, lexical, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 12. **@haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Link editing plugin (inline popover for URLs)
- **Key Exports**: `FloatingLinkEditorPlugin`, `FloatingLinkEditorPluginProps` type
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/link, @lexical/react, lexical, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 13. **@haklex/rich-plugin-mention** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Mention typeahead plugin (@username with platform selection: Twitter, GitHub, Discord, etc.)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Plugin: `MentionMenuPlugin`, `MentionMenuPluginProps` type
  - MenuItem: `MentionMenuItem`
  - Registry: `builtinPlatforms`, `getAllPlatforms()`, `MentionPlatformDef` type
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-renderer-mention, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/react, lexical
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 14. **@haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Slash command menu (typeahead for block insertion)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Plugin: `SlashMenuPlugin`, `SlashMenuPluginProps` type
  - UI: `SlashMenuItem`, `SlashMenuList`
  - Helpers: `collectNodeSlashItems()`, `getBuiltinItems()`
- **Already documented in CLAUDE.md**

#### 15. **@haklex/rich-plugin-table** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Table editing plugin (cell resizing, row/column handles)
- **Key Exports**: `TableCellResizerPlugin`, `TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin`
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: @lexical/react, @lexical/table, lexical, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

---

### Renderers (Static + Edit Split)

#### 16. **@haklex/rich-renderer-alert** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: GitHub-style alerts (info/warning/tip/caution/important)
- **Already documented; supports static/edit split**

#### 17. **@haklex/rich-renderer-banner** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Banner container renderer (colored block with nested content)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Static: `BannerRenderer` (default export)
  - Edit: `BannerEditRenderer`
- **Dual Entry**: `./` (edit) + `./static` (static only)
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token, lucide-react
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 18. **@haklex/rich-renderer-codeblock** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Code block with syntax highlighting (Shiki)
- **Already documented; no split (editable prop only)**

#### 19. **@haklex/rich-renderer-image** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Image renderer with captions and blurhash
- **Already documented; no split needed**

#### 20. **@haklex/rich-renderer-katex** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: KaTeX math renderer (inline + block equations)
- **Key Exports**: `KaTeXBlockEditNode`, `KaTeXInlineEditNode`, `KaTeXEditDecorator`, `katexEditNodes`
- **No default export (edit-only package)**
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-editor-ui, @haklex/rich-style-token, lucide-react, katex (optional)
- **Peerless**: @lexical/react, lexical, katex (optional)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 21. **@haklex/rich-renderer-linkcard** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Link preview card (URL → title/description/favicon)
- **Already documented; no split needed**

#### 22. **@haklex/rich-renderer-mention** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Social platform mention badges (Twitter, GitHub, Discord handles)
- **Already documented; supports static/edit split**

#### 23. **@haklex/rich-renderer-mermaid** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Mermaid diagram rendering
- **Already documented; supports static/edit split**

#### 24. **@haklex/rich-renderer-ruby** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Ruby annotation (furigana for Japanese text)
- **Key Exports**:
  - Static: `RubyRenderer`
  - Edit: `RubyEditRenderer`
  - Type: `RubyRendererProps`
- **Dual Entry**: `./` (edit) + `./static` (static only)
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-editor, @haklex/rich-style-token
- **Peerless**: None (no edit UI beyond markup)
- **CSS**: `./style.css`

#### 25. **@haklex/rich-renderer-video** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Responsive video player renderer
- **Already documented; no split needed**

---

### Aggregators

#### 26. **@haklex/rich-renderers** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Static-only renderer aggregator (tree-shakes all edit UI)
- **Key Export**: `enhancedRendererConfig` (RendererConfig object)
  - Includes: Alert, Banner, CodeBlock, Image, LinkCard, Mention, Ruby, Gallery, Mermaid, Video, CodeSnippet (all static variants)
- **Dependencies**: All @haklex/rich-renderer-* + @haklex/rich-ext-* (static exports)
- **Dual Entry**: Single config export

#### 27. **@haklex/rich-renderers-edit** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Edit-only aggregator (brings full edit UI)
- **Key Exports**: `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (spreads `enhancedRendererConfig` + overrides with edit renderers)
  - Overrides: Alert, Banner, CodeBlock, Image, Mention, Ruby, Gallery, Mermaid, Video, CodeSnippet, Footnote (all edit variants)
- **Dependencies**: @haklex/rich-renderers (for base config), all edit renderers/nodes

#### 28. **@haklex/rich-kit-shiro** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Production bundle for web app (all features pre-integrated)
- **Entry Points**: `./editor` (RichEditor) + `./renderer` (RichRenderer)
- **Already documented**

---

### Utilities & Diff Viewer

#### 29. **@haklex/rich-diff** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Side-by-side diff viewer for SerializedEditorState
- **Component**: `<RichDiff oldValue={...} newValue={...} variant="article" />`
- **Already documented**

#### 30. **@haklex/rich-editor-demo** (v0.0.44)
- **Purpose**: Dev playground (hot reload, all features)
- **Build target**: `pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev`

#### 31. **@haklex/types** (shiro-types)
- **Purpose**: Shared type definitions across monorepo
- **Already documented**

---

### Dependency & Registration Summary

**Node Registration**:
| Config | Location | Contains | Used By |
|--------|----------|----------|---------|
| `src/config.ts` | @haklex/rich-editor | 16 custom nodes (render-only) | RichRenderer |
| `src/config-edit.ts` | @haklex/rich-editor | 16 custom nodes (edit variants) | RichEditor |
| Dynamic | Individual packages | Edit node classes (KaTeXEditNode, etc.) | Packages export for registration |

**Renderer Registration**:
| Config | Location | Contains | Used By |
|--------|----------|----------|---------|
| `src/config.ts` | @haklex/rich-renderers | Static renderers + nodes | ShiroRenderer (read-only) |
| `src/config.ts` | @haklex/rich-renderers-edit | Edit renderers + plugins | ShiroEditor (editing) |

**New/Recently Expanded Packages**:
- **@haklex/cm-editor** — CodeMirror utilities (extracted)
- **@haklex/rich-headless** — Server-side parsing (zero-React)
- **@haklex/rich-style-token** — Centralized theming
- **@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet** — Multi-file snippets
- **@haklex/rich-ext-embed** — URL embeds (Twitter, YouTube, Bilibili, etc.)
- **@haklex/rich-ext-gallery** — Image gallery with lightbox
- **@haklex/rich-plugin-*** — 7 plugins (block-handle, floating-toolbar, link-edit, mention, table, slash-menu, tldraw)
- **@haklex/rich-renderer-banner** — Banner containers
- **@haklex/rich-renderer-katex** — Math equations
- **@haklex/rich-renderer-ruby** — Furigana annotations
- All packages support **static/edit split** where heavy edit deps are isolated.

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```md
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Overview

Lexical-based rich editor ecosystem. Modular packages: core editor, UI primitives, content renderers, plugins, extensions, and integration bundles.

**Build**: Vite 7 + Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS. ESM only (`.mjs`). TypeScript 5.9.

## Terminology: Static / Edit Split

The editor ecosystem splits both **nodes** and **renderers** into static (read-only) and edit (editor-only) variants for bundle optimization.

### Four Concepts

| Term | Layer | Purpose | Example |
|------|-------|---------|---------|
| **Static Node** | Lexical node class | Deserialize JSON + `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper`. No edit UI imports. | `CodeBlockNode`, `AlertQuoteNode` |
| **Edit Node** | Lexical node class | Extends static node, overrides `decorate()` to use edit decorator with heavy deps (Popover, NestedComposer, etc.) | `CodeBlockEditNode`, `AlertQuoteEditNode` |
| **Static Renderer** | React component | Display-only rendering. No `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` or `lucide-react` imports. | `AlertRenderer`, `MermaidRenderer` |
| **Edit Renderer** | React component | Adds edit UI (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog). Imports `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`. | `AlertEditRenderer`, `MermaidEditRenderer` |

### Bundle Optimization Strategy

\```
RichRenderer (read-only display)          RichEditor (full editing)
├── Static Nodes (config.ts)              ├── Edit Nodes (config-edit.ts)
├── Static Renderers                      ├── Edit Renderers
│   (enhancedRendererConfig)              │   (enhancedEditRendererConfig)
└── Zero edit UI deps                     └── Full edit UI deps
\```

**Key principle**: `RichRenderer` entry imports only static nodes + static renderers, so bundlers tree-shake all edit UI deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`, `lucide-react`, `LexicalNestedComposer`). `RichEditor` entry imports edit nodes + edit renderers that bring in these deps.

**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path introduces heavy imports absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean prop with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable`), no split needed.

### Registration

| Config file | Contains | Used by |
|-------------|----------|---------|
| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config.ts` | `customNodes` / `allNodes` (16 static nodes) | `RichRenderer` |
| `@haklex/rich-editor` `src/config-edit.ts` | `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit variants) | `RichEditor` |
| `@haklex/rich-renderers` `src/config.ts` | `enhancedRendererConfig` (11 static renderers) | `ShiroRenderer` |
| `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` `src/config.ts` | `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (12 edit renderers) | `ShiroEditor` |

## Package Dependency Graph

\```
@haklex/rich-kit-shiro (integration bundle for web app)
├── @haklex/rich-editor (core: editor + renderer + nodes + plugins + styles)
│   ├── @haklex/rich-editor-ui (headless Dialog, Dropdown, Popover via @base-ui/react)
│   ├── @haklex/rich-headless (server-side Lexical node registry, zero React)
│   └── @haklex/rich-style-token (theme tokens, CSS variables, variant presets)
├── @haklex/rich-static-renderer (headless SSR engine, RichRenderer component)
├── @haklex/rich-renderers (static-only renderer aggregator)
│   └── @haklex/rich-renderer-{alert,banner,codeblock,image,linkcard,mention,mermaid,ruby,video}
├── @haklex/rich-renderers-edit (edit-only renderer aggregator, depends on rich-renderers)
│   └── edit renderers + edit nodes + FootnoteRenderer
├── @haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet (multi-file code snippet, CodeMirror + @dnd-kit)
│   └── @haklex/cm-editor (CodeMirror 6 base theme/language utilities)
├── @haklex/rich-ext-embed (URL embeds: Twitter, YouTube, Bilibili, Codesandbox, Gist, GitHub)
├── @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw (whiteboard drawing extension)
├── @haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle (block add button + context menu)
├── @haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar (text formatting toolbar)
├── @haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit (inline link editing popover)
├── @haklex/rich-plugin-mention (@ mention typeahead with platform selection)
├── @haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu (typeahead slash commands)
├── @haklex/rich-plugin-table (cell resizing + row/column handles)
└── @haklex/rich-renderer-katex (KaTeX edit nodes: KaTeXBlockEditNode, KaTeXInlineEditNode)

@haklex/rich-diff (standalone diff viewer, depends on core)
@haklex/rich-editor-demo (dev playground, depends on all)
\```

## Commands

\```bash
# Build
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build            # BUILD_LIB=1 vite build
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-static-renderer build
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers build
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-renderers-edit build     # depends on rich-renderers

# Dev playground (hot reload, all features)
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev

# Watch mode for core iteration
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor dev:build
\```

## Foundation Packages

### @haklex/rich-style-token

Centralized theme tokens and CSS variables. Provides `createThemeStyle()`, variant presets (`articleTheme`, `noteTheme`, `commentTheme`), color constants (`darkColors`, `lightArticleColors`), layout constants, and `PortalThemeProvider` for shadow DOM theming. Used by nearly all packages.

### @haklex/rich-headless

Server-side Lexical node registry with zero React dependency. Exports `allHeadlessNodes` (20 node classes for JSON parsing), `allHeadlessTransformers`, and `$toMarkdown()`. Two entry points: `./` (nodes) and `./transformers` (markdown conversion).

### @haklex/cm-editor

Shared CodeMirror 6 utilities: `baseTheme`, `getThemeExtensions()`, `loadLanguageExtension()`. Used by `rich-ext-code-snippet` and `rich-renderer-codeblock` for code editing.

## Core: @haklex/rich-editor

Four entry points: `./` (all), `./editor` (RichEditor), `./static` (RichRenderer), `./styles` (CSS variables only).

### Directory Layout

- `src/nodes/` — 16 custom `DecoratorNode` types (Spoiler, Mention, KaTeXInline, KaTeXBlock, Image, AlertQuote, CodeBlock, Footnote, FootnoteSection, Video, LinkCard, Details, GridContainer, Banner, Mermaid, Ruby) + 5 edit variants (AlertQuoteEdit, BannerEdit, CodeBlockEdit, FootnoteSectionEdit, GridEdit)
- `src/plugins/` — 19 Lexical plugins (Alert, AutoFocus, AutoLink, BlockExit, BlockId, DragDrop, EditorRef, Footnote, HeadingAnchor, HorizontalRule, Image, ImageUpload, KaTeX, MarkdownShortcuts, Mermaid, OnChange, SubmitShortcut)
- `src/styles/` — Vanilla Extract: 3 variants × 2 color schemes = 6 theme classes
- `src/transformers/` — 14 Markdown shortcut transformers (alert `>[!NOTE]`, KaTeX `$$`, mention `@`, spoiler `||`, footnote `[^1]`, ruby, container, grid, quote, superscript/subscript, insert, rich-blocks, code-block)
- `src/context/` — 5 contexts: `ColorSchemeContext` (light/dark), `RendererConfigContext` (custom renderer injection), `ImageUploadContext` (upload function injection), `FootnoteDefinitionsContext`, `NestedContentRendererContext`
- `src/components/renderers/` — built-in default renderers (Alert, Banner, CodeBlock, Footnote, FootnoteSection, Grid, Image, KaTeX, LinkCard, Mention, Mermaid, Ruby, Video + decorators)

**Context Provider value stability**: Never pass object literals as context provider `value`. Primitives (string, function) can be passed directly (e.g. `ColorSchemeContext`, `ImageUploadContext`). Objects must be wrapped in `useMemo` (e.g. `RendererConfigContext`).

### Custom Node Pattern

All custom content nodes extend `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`:

\```typescript
class FooNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  static importJSON(serialized) / exportJSON()
  decorate() → <RendererWrapper type="Foo" props={...} />
}
export function $createFooNode(payload): FooNode
export function $isFooNode(node): node is FooNode
\```

`RendererWrapper` delegates to custom renderer (via `RendererConfig`) or falls back to built-in default.

### Node: Edit / Render Split

Nodes with heavy edit UI are split into two classes for tree-shaking:

| Base Node (render-only) | Edit Node (editor-only) | Edit Dependency |
|------------------------|------------------------|-----------------|
| `AlertQuoteNode` | `AlertQuoteEditNode` | `AlertEditDecorator` + LexicalNestedComposer |
| `BannerNode` | `BannerEditNode` | `BannerEditDecorator` + LexicalNestedComposer |
| `CodeBlockNode` | `CodeBlockEditNode` | `CodeBlockEditDecorator` |
| `FootnoteSectionNode` | `FootnoteSectionEditNode` | `FootnoteSectionEditRenderer` |
| `GridContainerNode` | `GridEditNode` | `GridReadOnlyDecorator` → `GridEditDecorator` |
| `KaTeXBlockNode` | `KaTeXBlockEditNode`* | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |
| `KaTeXInlineNode` | `KaTeXInlineEditNode`* | `KaTeXEditDecorator` + Popover |

*KaTeX edit nodes live in `@haklex/rich-renderer-katex`, not in `rich-editor`.

**Base node** `decorate()` returns `RendererWrapper` (or lightweight read-only decorator). No edit UI imports.

**Edit node** extends base node, overrides `clone()` / `importJSON()` / `decorate()` to use the full edit decorator with heavy deps.

Config files:
- `src/config.ts` — `customNodes` / `allNodes` (render-only, used by `RichRenderer`)
- `src/config-edit.ts` — `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes` (edit nodes, used by `RichEditor`)

**Adding a new node with edit UI**: Create base node with `RendererWrapper` in `decorate()`, then create `FooEditNode extends FooNode` overriding `decorate()` with edit decorator. Register base in `config.ts`, edit in `config-edit.ts`.

### Plugin Pattern

\```typescript
export const INSERT_FOO_COMMAND = createCommand<Payload>('INSERT_FOO_COMMAND')
export function FooPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  useEffect(() => editor.registerCommand(INSERT_FOO_COMMAND, handler, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR), [editor])
  return null
}
\```

## External Plugin Packages

Plugins extracted into separate packages for independent versioning and tree-shaking:

| Package | Key Export | Purpose |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| `@haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle` | `BlockHandlePlugin` | Block add button + context menu |
| `@haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar` | `FloatingToolbarPlugin` | Text formatting floating toolbar |
| `@haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit` | `FloatingLinkEditorPlugin` | Inline link editing popover |
| `@haklex/rich-plugin-mention` | `MentionMenuPlugin` | @ mention typeahead with platform selection |
| `@haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu` | `SlashMenuPlugin` | Typeahead slash commands for block insertion |
| `@haklex/rich-plugin-table` | `TableCellResizerPlugin`, `TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin` | Table cell resizing + row/column handles |

All plugin packages depend on `@haklex/rich-style-token` for theming and export `./style.css`.

## Extension Packages

Extensions add complete features (nodes + renderers + plugins) with heavy isolated dependencies:

| Package | Purpose | Key Deps |
|---------|---------|----------|
| `@haklex/rich-ext-code-snippet` | Multi-file code snippet with drag-reorder | `@haklex/cm-editor`, `@dnd-kit/*`, `shiki` |
| `@haklex/rich-ext-embed` | URL embeds (Twitter, YouTube, Bilibili, Codesandbox, Gist, GitHub) | `react-tweet`, `lucide-react` |
| `@haklex/rich-ext-gallery` | Image gallery with drag-reorder and lightbox | `@dnd-kit/*`, `react-photo-view`, `thumbhash` |
| `@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw` | Whiteboard drawing (tldraw snapshot as JSON) | `tldraw` (lazy-loaded) |

Extensions with static/edit split export dual entries: `./` (edit) and `./static` (render-only).

## Variant System

Controlled by `variant` prop + `ColorSchemeContext`. Theme CSS variables in `@haklex/rich-style-token` via `createThemeStyle()`.

| Variant | Font | Size | Line-height | Max-width | Use case |
|---------|------|------|-------------|-----------|----------|
| article | system sans-serif | 16px | 1.75 | 65ch | Blog posts |
| note | CJK serif (Noto Serif CJK SC) | 16px | 1.8 | 65ch | Personal notes |
| comment | system sans-serif | 14px | 1.5 | none | Inline comments |

## Renderer Config (Custom Renderer Injection)

\```typescript
interface RendererConfig {
  Alert?, Banner?, CodeBlock?, CodeSnippet?, Component?, Footnote?,
  Gallery?, Image?, KaTeX?, LinkCard?, Mermaid?, Mention?,
  Ruby?, Tabs?, Video?
}
<RichEditor rendererConfig={...} />
<RichRenderer rendererConfig={...} />
\```

## Individual Renderer Packages

`@haklex/rich-renderer-*` packages provide feature-specific renderers with heavy dependencies isolated:
- `alert` — GitHub-style alerts (info/warning/tip/caution/important)
- `banner` — Colored banner container with nested content
- `codeblock` — Shiki syntax highlighting
- `image` — Blurhash/thumbhash, captions, accent colors
- `katex` — KaTeX math equations (edit nodes only: `KaTeXBlockEditNode`, `KaTeXInlineEditNode`)
- `linkcard` — Link preview cards
- `mention` — Social platform mention badges
- `mermaid` — Mermaid diagram rendering
- `ruby` — Ruby annotation (furigana for Japanese text)
- `video` — Responsive video players

`@haklex/rich-renderers` aggregates all, with sub-path exports: `./codeblock`, `./mermaid`, etc.

### Renderer: Edit / Static Split

Renderer components with edit-only heavy deps are split into static and edit variants:

| Package | Static (display-only) | Edit (with edit UI) | Edit Dependency |
|---------|----------------------|---------------------|-----------------|
| `rich-renderer-alert` | `AlertRenderer` | `AlertEditRenderer` | DropdownMenu (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
| `rich-renderer-banner` | `BannerRenderer` | `BannerEditRenderer` | DropdownMenu + Popover (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
| `rich-renderer-codeblock` | `CodeBlockRenderer` | `CodeBlockEditRenderer` | CodeMirror edit overlay |
| `rich-renderer-image` | `ImageRenderer` | `ImageEditRenderer` | Upload/edit UI |
| `rich-renderer-mention` | `MentionRenderer` | `MentionEditRenderer` | Popover (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) + lucide-react |
| `rich-renderer-mermaid` | `MermaidRenderer` | `MermaidEditRenderer` | presentDialog (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`) |
| `rich-renderer-ruby` | `RubyRenderer` | `RubyEditRenderer` | Edit markup UI |
| `rich-renderer-video` | `VideoRenderer` | `VideoEditRenderer` | Edit URL UI |
| `rich-ext-code-snippet` | `CodeSnippetRenderer` | `CodeSnippetEditRenderer` | CodeMirror + @dnd-kit |
| `rich-ext-gallery` | `GalleryRenderer` | `GalleryEditRenderer` | @dnd-kit + upload UI |

Aggregator packages:
- `@haklex/rich-renderers` — static-only. `enhancedRendererConfig` (`src/config.ts`), for `RichRenderer`. No edit deps.
- `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit` — edit-only. `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (`src/config.ts`), for `RichEditor`. Spreads `enhancedRendererConfig` and overrides with edit variants. Also re-exports `FootnoteRenderer`.

**Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path imports heavy deps (`@haklex/rich-editor-ui` components, `lucide-react` icons) absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean flag with no extra imports, splitting adds complexity with no bundle benefit.

**Adding a new renderer with edit UI**: Create `FooRenderer` (static) and `FooEditRenderer` (edit) in the same package. Export static from `./static` entry, edit from `./` entry. Add static to `enhancedRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers`, edit to `enhancedEditRendererConfig` in `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit`.

## Integration: @haklex/rich-kit-shiro

Production bundle for the web app. Combines core + all renderers + all plugins + extensions.

\```typescript
import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style.css'
import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/editor'   // → enhancedEditRendererConfig
import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderer' // → enhancedRendererConfig
\```

`ShiroEditor` uses `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit renderers). `ShiroRenderer` uses `enhancedRendererConfig` (static renderers). This ensures the renderer entry tree-shakes all edit UI deps (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog, lucide-react edit icons).

## Diff Viewer (@haklex/rich-diff)

\```typescript
<RichDiff oldValue={...} newValue={...} variant="article" />
\```

Compares two `SerializedEditorState` at node level. Side-by-side layout with insert/delete highlighting.

## Build Configuration

Each package uses the same Vite pattern:

- `BUILD_LIB=1` triggers library mode build
- Vanilla Extract plugin for CSS-in-TS → static CSS (zero runtime)
- All React, Lexical, and peer deps externalized
- Output: ESM `.mjs` + `.d.ts` declarations
- Target: ES2020

## Styling

Vanilla Extract (`*.css.ts` files) throughout. No Tailwind in editor packages. Theme contract defines CSS variables for colors, spacing, typography, and border-radius. Each variant+colorScheme combination produces a class name applied to the editor root.

### Neutral colors

Use a **neutral** (gray) color palette for secondary/muted text, borders, section labels, and descriptions—e.g. `#737373` / `#a3a3a3` (Tailwind neutral-500/400). Avoid tinted grays (slate, zinc, blue-gray) unless a design explicitly requires them. This keeps UI elements like slash menu sections and descriptions hue-neutral.
